title: Maresia meyeri

Maresia meyeri has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
